title: Variable Hoppers
description: Change the mechanics of minecraft hoppers.
body:
# Variable Hoppers

I originally build this so I could build and test farms in creative for the DonutSMP server, as they have different hopper speed settings. The default config of this mod will be the DonutSMP hopper settings (batch size of 12 items, cooldown of 5 ticks).

## Features

- **Adjustable Batch Size**: Transfer 1 to 64 items per operation
- **Adjustable Cooldown**: Set delay between transfers (1-100 ticks)
- **Server-Friendly**: Works on both servers and singleplayer
- **Lightweight**: No performance impact

## Comparison

| Setting | Vanilla | DonutSMP Config |
|---------|---------|----------------|
| Batch Size | 1 item | 12 items |
| Cooldown | 8 ticks (0.4s) | 5 ticks (0.25s) |
| Transfer Rate | 2.5 items/sec | 48 items/sec |

## Commands

All commands require **operator permission** (level 2).

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/variablehoppers` | Show current settings |
| `/variablehoppers batchsize <1-64>` | Items transferred per operation |
| `/variablehoppers cooldown <1-100>` | Ticks between transfers |
| `/variablehoppers reset` | Reset to vanilla values |

**Short alias:** Use `/vh` instead of `/variablehoppers`

## Understanding the Settings

### Batch Size
How many items move in a single transfer operation.
- **Vanilla:** 1 item
- **Range:** 1-64 items

How many game ticks between each transfer.
- **Vanilla:** 8 ticks (0.4 seconds)
- **Range:** 1-100 ticks
- **Note:** 20 ticks = 1 second

### Transfer Rate Formula
```
Items per second = (20 ÷ cooldown) × batchSize
```

## License
This mod is available under the **MIT License**. Feel free to include it in modpacks!
